trigger.description: Bind this property to a tag value or expression. Every time the value changes the animation replays. Accepts boolean, number, or string.

animation.description: GSAP animation configuration. Drives what happens when 'trigger' changes.

type.description: The GSAP tween type: 'to' animates TO vars, 'from' animates FROM vars, 'fromTo' specifies both start and end states, 'timeline' runs an ordered sequence of steps.

target.description: CSS selector for element(s) inside the container to animate (e.g. '.gsap-target', '#my-box', 'div'). For 'timeline' type this acts as the fallback selector for steps that omit their own target.

delay.description: Seconds to wait before the animation starts.

repeat.description: Number of times to repeat after the first play. Use -1 for infinite.

yoyo.description: When true, every other repeat reverses direction (ping-pong effect). Requires repeat != 0.

vars.description: The destination state for 'to' and 'fromTo' animations. Any CSS property GSAP can animate: opacity, x, y, xPercent, yPercent, scale, scaleX, scaleY, rotation, rotationX, rotationY, skewX, skewY, width, height, backgroundColor, color, borderRadius, etc.

fromVars.description: The starting state for 'fromTo' animations. Same properties as 'vars'.

steps.description: Ordered list of tween steps for the 'timeline' animation type. Steps run sequentially by default; use the 'position' parameter for parallel or offset placement.

target.description: CSS selector for this step's target element(s). Falls back to animation.target if omitted.

position.description: Timeline position. Omit for sequential. Use '<' to start with previous, '+=0.2' for offset, a label string to jump to a label, or a numeric absolute time.

content.description: HTML markup rendered inside the animation stage. Give animatable elements the CSS class or ID that matches the 'target' selector. Inline styles here set the initial visual state.

autoplay.description: When true the animation plays immediately when the component first mounts, without waiting for a trigger change.
